constraints.data_flow: outputs of child N become inputs of child N+1

ROUTER.description: Conditional branching based on condition_port value

constraints.branches: must define branches mapping from condition values to child IDs
constraints.default_branch: optional, used when condition value not in branches

LOOP.description: Iterative execution of body based on iterator_port

constraints.body: single child or subgraph representing loop body
constraints.termination: must have either max_iterations or termination_port

constraints.fork_reference: must reference existing FORK node by fork_id
constraints.waits_for: all branches of referenced FORK must complete

constraints.subgraph: embedded graph structure defining macro behavior

control_flow.description: Edges between control nodes define execution order

data_flow.description: Edges between functional nodes define data dependencies

cross_type.description: Mixed control and data flow edges
cross_type.constraints: must respect port types and coerce rules
